sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: News Corporation (NWS) outlines $1B buy-back and recent on-market share repurchases
feed.summary: News Corporation (NWS) has provided details on its existing stock repurchase program, which authorizes up to $1 billion in buy-backs of its Nasdaq-listed Class A and Class B common stock. The company disclosed recent on-market share repurchases, including 70,004 Class A shares for over $1.8 million and 30,471 Class B shares for over $926,000 on April 24, 2026. News Corp emphasizes that future repurchase activities are subject to market conditions and other factors.

feed.title: AIG hands CEO role to Eric Andersen as Peter Zaffino shifts to chair
feed.summary: AIG announced that Eric Andersen will become President and Chief Executive Officer, effective June 1, 2026, and will join the Board of Directors. Peter Zaffino will transition to Executive Chair of the AIG Board of Directors, marking the completion of the company's leadership transition plan. Both Andersen and Zaffino expressed confidence in AIG's future growth and strategic execution under the new leadership structure.

feed.title: NexMetals (NASDAQ: NEXM) boosts Selkirk copper and nickel recoveries
feed.summary: NexMetals Mining Corp. announced significantly improved metallurgical results from its Selkirk nickel-copper-PGE project in Botswana. Locked cycle tests demonstrate enhanced copper and nickel recoveries, higher concentrate grades, and the potential for payable levels of platinum, palladium, gold, silver, and cobalt. These positive results will be incorporated into a new Mineral Resource Estimate expected in Q2 2026, aiming to strengthen the project's economics and explore potential commercial options.

feed.title: AutoZone Completes Google Cloud Migration
feed.summary: AutoZone Inc. has successfully completed a full stack migration of most of its applications to Google Cloud, exiting legacy data centers in under three years. This strategic move aims to enhance performance, observability, and long-term flexibility. AutoZone plans to further leverage Google AI Cloud and Gemini Enterprise for improved system monitoring, accelerated development, and increased productivity.

feed.title: What's Going On With ON Semiconductor Stock Monday? - NIO (NYSE:NIO), ON Semiconductor (NASDAQ:ON)
feed.summary: ON Semiconductor's shares are up following an expanded collaboration with NIO Inc. to supply EliteSiC technology for NIO's next-generation 900V EV platforms, aimed at improving efficiency and performance. The company is set to report earnings on May 4, 2026, with analysts anticipating increased EPS and revenue. Bank of America Securities recently upgraded ON Semiconductor to Buy, citing an improving pipeline and strong financial outlook.

feed.title: Eric Sites joins Miami International Holdings (MIAX) board of directors
feed.summary: Miami International Holdings, Inc. announced the appointment of Eric Sites to its board of directors, effective April 24, 2026. He will fill an existing vacancy and serve until the 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders, receiving the same compensation as other non-employee directors. The company confirmed no family relationships with existing directors or executive officers and no transactions requiring special disclosure.

feed.title: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods Adjusts Price Target on CoStar Group to $57 From $70, Maintains Outperform Rating

This adjustment reflects a revised outlook from the analyst firm, following recent target adjustments by other financial institutions as well. CoStar Group specializes in providing information, analytics, and online marketplaces for the real estate industry.

feed.title: United says American Airlines rebuffed potential merger idea
feed.summary: United Airlines has ended its pursuit of a merger with American Airlines after its initial approach was declined. United CEO Scott Kirby had raised the idea of a combination with American during a meeting with former U.S. President Donald Trump, but concerns about antitrust implications were noted by analysts.

feed.title: Exxon Mobil Corporation stock (US30231G1022): Is its energy moat strong enough to unlock new upside?
feed.summary: Exxon Mobil's integrated business model, scale, and technological advancements provide a strong economic moat, positioning it for steady returns amidst evolving global energy demands and economic shifts. The company's diversified portfolio, including oil, gas, refined products, and petrochemicals, along with its focus on key assets like the Permian Basin and LNG projects, supports consistent cash flows and dividends. While facing risks from market volatility and regulatory pressures, analysts generally view Exxon favorably for its dividend reliability and free cash flow generation, making it a compelling consideration for investors seeking stable energy exposure.

feed.title: Martin Marietta names Chris Samborski as chief operating officer By Investing.com
feed.summary: Martin Marietta Materials, Inc. has announced Chris Samborski as its new Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer, effective May 1. Samborski previously led the company's West and Specialties Divisions and held leadership roles at Caterpillar and Johnson & Johnson. This appointment comes as Martin Marietta continues its strong financial performance, with analysts maintaining positive outlooks following a recent asset exchange and anticipating further M&A activity.

feed.title: Armata Pharmaceuticals adds Pfizer executive to board By Investing.com
feed.summary: Armata Pharmaceuticals Inc. (NYSE American:ARMP) has appointed Daniel B. Gilmer, Ph.D., a Pfizer executive, to its Board of Directors. Armata is a biotechnology company focused on bacteriophage therapeutics for antibiotic-resistant infections, and its stock has seen significant gains, though InvestingPro analysis suggests it may be overvalued despite strong momentum.

feed.title: Caterpillar Inc. stock (US1491231015): Is infrastructure demand strong enough to unlock new upside?
feed.summary: Caterpillar Inc. is well-positioned for growth due to increasing global infrastructure spending and its dominance in heavy machinery. The company benefits from its extensive product range, global dealer network, and investment in sustainable technologies, making it an attractive investment for those seeking exposure to industrial growth. Despite potential risks like cyclicality and supply chain issues, analysts maintain a cautiously optimistic outlook due to its strong market position and reliable dividend.
